name: Mindray BC-5000 (Hematology)
_note_host: 0.0.0.0 means listen on all interfaces. The BC-5000 PUSHES data to this PC. Set the middleware PC's IP address in the BC-5000 communication settings.
_note_port: Match this to the port configured in BC-5000 > Service > Communication > LIS. Default is usually 6000 but can be any port.
_setup_steps: 1. On BC-5000: Service menu > Communication > Host Settings
3. Set Host IP: [IP address of the PC running this middleware]
4. Set Host Port: 6000 (or whatever port you choose)
8. On middleware PC: Ensure port 6000 is open in Windows Firewall
9. On middleware PC: Run this middleware, it will listen for incoming data

HGB.note: BC-5000 sends g/L, LIMS expects g/dL. If your BC-5000 already sends g/dL, remove this.
